---
title: "test_cstar_dispatcher_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_cstar_dispatcher_empire.py"
loc: 12
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.47
style_score: 5.33
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.81
---

## Intent
The `test_cstar_dispatcher_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_dispatcher_discovery. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_dispatcher_discovery. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 5.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.cstar_dispatcher](file://src.core.cstar_dispatcher)

### Exports
- `test_dispatcher_discovery`
